source_intake_record.raw_question_text: We wish to produce refrigeration at−30\circ\text{C}\. A reservoir is available at 200\circ\text{C}\ and the ambient temperature is 30\circ\text{C}.Thus, work can be done by a cyclic heat engine operating between the 200\circ\text{C} reservoir and the ambient. This work is used to drive the refrigerator. Determine the ratio of the heat transferred from the 200\circ\text{C}\ reservoir to the heat transferred from the−30\circ\text{C} reservoir, assuming all processes are reversible.
